sections.paragraph:
προσαναλαμβάνω (Polyb.; Diod S 13, 3, 3; pap) take in besides, welcome πάντας ἡμᾶς us all to the fire Ac 28:2 v.l.

Polyb Polyb , III–II b.c.—List 5

Diod S Diod S , I b.c.—List 5

pap pap = papyrus, -yri

v.l. v.l. = varia lectio (variant reading)

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 876
